generated_assessment.reasoning: The baseline (-217) is already aligned with the adversarial goal, so the T1 atomic fear appeal tries to intensify opposition. The profile’s very high Neuroticism (76.8th pct) and high Anger/Hostility (76.7th) and Anxiety (66.8th) make it receptive to threat-salient personal-safety messages, and low Openness (24.3rd pct) limits updating from counter-arguments. However, the attack is only a single artifact with no sustained exposure, so movement is modest — around 19 points deeper into opposition.
